chunks.text: In the evening the family gathered at the dinner table.
Mother was finishing her preparation for the meal.
Father said, " I am going to have a drink tonight.
" He had already made up his intend.
Sister wanted to discuss the travel plan.
She proposed that I go with her.
My brother offered, " I will drive you both to the airport next weekend.
Father admitted, " If you make pasta, I will help.
" What shall we do about dinner tomorrow?
Mother answered at once, " I will make it.
" I added my own suggestion: " I will make a salad.
" Several small decision fell into place around the table.
Father, from his usual seat, said he would prefer fish.
Sister would approach him with a small nod and confirm the plan.
Dinner flowed slowly, more slowly than usual.
